evals.name: simple-webapp
evals.prompt: Create a GCP architecture diagram for a simple web app: Cloud Load Balancer -> Cloud Run (API) -> Cloud SQL and Cloud Storage. Include a VPC wrapper around the compute and data layers.
evals.expected_output: SVG with networking layer (LB), VPC container with compute (Cloud Run) and data (Cloud SQL + Cloud Storage) layers inside. Arrows between layers.

assertions.name: produces_svg
assertions.description: Generates a valid SVG file with <?xml and <svg tags

assertions.name: has_container
assertions.description: Spec contains a container element for VPC

assertions.name: correct_icons
assertions.description: Uses cloud-run, cloud-sql, cloud-storage, networking icon IDs

assertions.name: has_arrows
assertions.description: Spec contains arrow elements between layers

assertions.name: grid_aligned
assertions.description: Icons are evenly spaced (inherent from render.py)

evals.name: ml-pipeline
evals.prompt: I need a GCP ML pipeline architecture diagram. The pipeline has: Data ingestion from Cloud Storage and BigQuery, processing in Dataflow, model training on Vertex AI, model serving via Cloud Run, and monitoring with Cloud Logging. Group these into Data, Processing, ML, and Serving layers.
evals.expected_output: SVG with 4 distinct colored layers. Data layer has Cloud Storage and BigQuery. Processing has Dataflow (data-analytics icon). ML has Vertex AI. Serving has Cloud Run. Monitoring shown in a separate layer or alongside.

assertions.name: four_layers
assertions.description: Spec has at least 4 layer elements

assertions.name: correct_category_icons
assertions.description: Uses data-analytics for Dataflow, observability for Logging

assertions.name: color_coded
assertions.description: Each layer uses a different color

evals.name: multi-tenant
evals.prompt: Generate a multi-tenant SaaS architecture on GCP. Customer Tenant has: web frontend (Cloud CDN + Load Balancer), API layer (GKE). Shared Services Tenant has: databases (Cloud SQL, Cloud Spanner), AI (Vertex AI), storage (Cloud Storage), security (IAM, Cloud KMS, Security Command Center). Show both tenants with clear boundaries and a bridge between them.
evals.expected_output: SVG with two container elements (different colors) separated by a bridge element. Customer container has frontend and API layers. Shared Services container has data, AI, and security layers.

assertions.name: two_containers
assertions.description: Spec has at least 2 container elements

assertions.name: has_bridge
assertions.description: Spec has a bridge element between containers

assertions.name: correct_icons
assertions.description: Uses gke, cloud-sql, cloud-spanner, vertex-ai, security-command-center

assertions.name: tenant_separation
assertions.description: Containers use different colors for visual distinction

evals.name: split-row
evals.prompt: Create a GCP architecture diagram with a compute layer (Cloud Run, GKE, Compute Engine) at the top, then below it a split row: on the left (75% width) a data layer with BigQuery, Cloud SQL, Cloud Spanner, and on the right (25% width) a cache layer with Memorystore.
evals.expected_output: SVG with a compute layer at top, then an arrow, then a split element with ratios [3, 1] containing a data layer (left) and cache layer (right).

assertions.name: correct_icons
assertions.description: Uses cloud-run, gke, compute-engine, bigquery, cloud-sql, cloud-spanner, databases

evals.name: complex-hero
evals.prompt: Create a comprehensive GCP architecture diagram for an AI Agent platform. Include: a legend, an Input Sources layer (Documents, Images, Audio from Cloud Storage), Agent Engine container (with layers for Runtime using agents/vertex-ai icons, and Foundation Models using ai-machine-learning), a Skills split (main skills on left 75% with developer-tools icons, data services on right 25% with BigQuery), a Serving layer (Cloud Run, Apigee), and an Infrastructure layer (IAM, Cloud Logging, Cloud Monitoring). Use appropriate colors for each section.
evals.expected_output: SVG using all major element types: legend, layers, container, split, arrows. Multiple colors. 10+ services total.

assertions.name: has_container
assertions.description: Spec contains at least one container

assertions.name: service_count
assertions.description: At least 10 services across all layers
